name: ai-maestro-janitor
description: Session-scoped janitor: reconciles PRs, worktrees, TRDDs, tasks; nudges to commit often, act on subagent reports, and never leave work stale; handles rate-limit auto-resume and prompt-cache keep-alive via a single durable CronCreate heartbeat. No external daemons.

github_repo.title: GitHub Repository
github_repo.description: GitHub repo slug for PR reconciliation (owner/repo). Defaults to the origin remote when unset.

trdd_path.title: TRDD Directory Path
trdd_path.description: Relative path from project root to the TRDD directory. Default: design/tasks

heartbeat_cron.title: Heartbeat Cron Expression
heartbeat_cron.description: Standard 5-field cron for the janitor heartbeat. Default: "*/5 * * * *" (every 5 min — aligned with the prompt-cache TTL, low token cost per fire). Raise to e.g. "*/20 * * * *" if you are using the 1-hour cache and accept longer idle gaps.

pr_reconciler_interval.title: PR Reconciler Internal Cadence (seconds)
pr_reconciler_interval.description: Minimum seconds between PR reconciliation passes. The heartbeat may fire more often; this just throttles the detector's work. Default: 900 (15 min).

worktree_janitor_interval.title: Worktree Janitor Internal Cadence (seconds)
worktree_janitor_interval.description: Minimum seconds between worktree scans. Default: 900 (15 min).

trdd_drift_interval.title: TRDD Drift Check Internal Cadence (seconds)
trdd_drift_interval.description: Minimum seconds between TRDD drift checks. Default: 3600 (1 h).

trdd_reminder_interval.title: TRDD Reminder Internal Cadence (seconds)
trdd_reminder_interval.description: Minimum seconds between in-progress TRDD reminders. Default: 14400 (4 h).

task_pr_mismatch_interval.title: Task/PR Mismatch Internal Cadence (seconds)
task_pr_mismatch_interval.description: Minimum seconds between task/PR cross-checks. Default: 1800 (30 min).

trdd_staleness_days.title: TRDD Staleness Threshold (days)
trdd_staleness_days.description: Days a TRDD can sit 'In progress' before it counts as drift. Default: 14.

stale_pr_days.title: Stale PR Threshold (days)
stale_pr_days.description: Days an open PR can sit without new commits before it counts as stale. Default: 14.

stale_task_interval.title: Stale Task Detector Cadence (seconds)
stale_task_interval.description: Minimum seconds between stale-task scans. Default: 1800 (30 min).

stale_in_progress_threshold.title: Stale in_progress Threshold (seconds)
stale_in_progress_threshold.description: Seconds an in_progress task can sit with no update before nudging. Default: 7200 (2 h).

stale_pending_threshold.title: Stale pending Threshold (seconds)
stale_pending_threshold.description: Seconds a pending task can sit with no update before nudging. Default: 86400 (24 h).

dirty_tree_interval.title: Dirty Tree Detector Cadence (seconds)
dirty_tree_interval.description: Minimum seconds between dirty-tree checks. Default: 300 (5 min).

dirty_tree_threshold.title: Dirty Tree Threshold (seconds)
dirty_tree_threshold.description: Seconds the working tree can stay dirty before nudging to commit. Default: 1800 (30 min). Commit often — each commit is a recovery point.

subagent_report_interval.title: Subagent Report Detector Cadence (seconds)
subagent_report_interval.description: Minimum seconds between subagent-report scans. Default: 3600 (1 h).

subagent_report_lookback.title: Subagent Report Lookback Window (seconds)
subagent_report_lookback.description: Age cutoff for reports considered 'fresh' and needing action. Default: 86400 (24 h).
